comment.text: The translation key "CancelChange" is used to display the text "Cancel change" in a cancel button within a storage settings portal. This text is intended to be clicked when a user wants to discard any changes made to their storage plan or settings.

usage.context:
textDecoration="underline dashed"
 onClick={isCancelLoading ? () => {} : onCancelChange}
 fontWeight={600}
 color="accent"
 >
 {t("Payments:CancelChange")}
 </Link>

 <div className={styles.loaderContainer}>
 <Loader
